archetype: 2 (The Performance Pro) - Sci-Fi Tactical FPS (Void Black & Cyan/Red)

layout.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6 to p-12 for containers. HUD elements use compact p-4.

grid_modes.main_menu: Asymmetric split layout. Not standard columns.
grid_modes.lobby: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6).
grid_modes.hud: Absolute positioning around the viewport edges.

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-[#00E5FF] text-[#00E5FF] hover:bg-[#00E5FF] hover:text-[#050508] transition-all duration-200 uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-3 rounded-none shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-200 uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-3 rounded-none
buttons.danger: bg-transparent border border-[#FF2A2A] text-[#FF2A2A] hover:bg-[#FF2A2A] hover:text-[#050508] transition-all duration-200 uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-3 rounded-none

visual_enhancers.global: Retro-Futurism terminal scanlines over the entire UI (pointer-events-none overlay with CSS repeating-linear-gradient).
visual_enhancers.hud_elements: 3D Spatial Depth: HUD elements should feel tactile with neon dropshadows, not just flat 2D.
visual_enhancers.animations: Sharp, fast micro-interactions. Glitch effects on hover for main menu items.

image_urls.description: Flesh monster heart with multiple faces - the main antagonist. Use in Main Menu background to build tension.
Deep space dark nebula. Use as base background behind the UI or monster.
Intricate galaxy starscape texture. Good for overlays or secondary backgrounds.

main_menu.layout: Asymmetrical split. Left side is navigation list, vertically centered. Right side features the monster heart image.
main_menu.visuals: Monster image must have a heavy dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#050508] via-[#050508]/80 to-transparent) so it emerges from the darkness.
main_menu.elements: Massive Game Title (H1). Menu options: PLAY SINGLEPLAYER, MULTIPLAYER LOBBY, SETTINGS. High contrast hover states.

lobby.layout: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Left column (col-span-1) for connected players. Center/Right (col-span-2) for match details, map preview, and loadout.
lobby.elements: Player slots use bento cards with neon cyan borders. 'START DEPLOYMENT' button pulsing at the bottom right.

hud.layout: Absolute positioning over the 'game view'. Minimalist and pushed to the edges.
hud.elements: Bottom Left: Health/Armor bars with tech_green and cyan. Bottom Right: Ammo counter (massive typography). Top Left: Circular Minimap. Top Center: Objective text ('DESTROY THE HEART'). Center: Dynamic crosshair.

game_over.layout: Centered flex layout with full screen overlay.
game_over.elements: Blood Red overlay (bg-[#FF2A2A]/10 backdrop-blur-sm). Massive 'MISSION FAILED' or 'RECURSION BROKEN' in H1. 'RETURN TO MENU' CTA.

settings.layout: Centered modal or dedicated screen using Glassmorphism surface.
settings.elements: Audio, Video, Controls tabs. Use Shadcn UI customized to look brutalist (sharp edges, no radius, 1px borders).

instructions_to_main_agent: Import Google Fonts: Rajdhani and IBM Plex Mono.
Implement a subtle scanline overlay (pointer-events-none) across the app to enhance the sci-fi tactical feel.
Buttons and cards MUST have sharp edges (rounded-none).
For the HUD view, use the deep space background image to simulate the 3D world behind the UI.
HUD elements must use Glassmorphism (bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-md and 1px border-white/10) to ensure readability.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, lobby slots, navigation links).
Use Lucide-react for icons (crosshair, ammo, health, settings).
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Stick strictly to Rajdhani and IBM Plex Mono.
